mapper.sql: id, name, nickname, email, password, profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, profile_image_object_key as profileImageObjectKey, role, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select: select from members order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into members (name, nickname, email, password, profile_image_url, role, created_at) values ( #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{password}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{role}, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update members set nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update members set profile_image_object_key = #{profileImageObjectKey}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{memberId}
